message:
fix(upgrade): clear progress line for unknown Content-Length

The finish() function only cleared the progress line when total > 0,
but displayProgress() also prints progress when total <= 0 (unknown
Content-Length). This caused the progress text to remain on screen
when the checkmark was printed.

Now finish() clears in all TTY cases, fixing the display for downloads
where Content-Length header is not provided.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
